Video Generation

AI-powered video generation tools

10 tools listed, sorted by rating

🤖 AI Large Models (20) 🖼️ Image Generation (16) 💻 Coding Assistants (14) 🎬 Video Generation (10) 🤝 AI Assistants (5) 📊 Productivity (3) 💬 AI Chat (2) 🧩 Agent Platform (2) 🎵 AI Music (1)

Seedance 2.0

⭐ 5
Video Generation

ByteDance's AI video generation tool. The 2.0 full version went viral on Bilibili. 1080p resolution, unlimited free use, no watermark, no queue, supports face upload. One of the best free AI video generators available.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: N/A
View Details

MiniMax Hailuo

⭐ 4.5
Video Generation

By MiniMax, natural motion effects that don't look AI-generated. 300 free credits on signup, generous for its category.

🆓 66 credits/day (Daily)
Paid from: $9.99/month
View Details

Kling AI

⭐ 4
Video Generation

Kuaishou's flagship video generation model. Produces some of the most realistic AI videos. Kling 3.0 full version is now available with unlimited free 1080p watermark-free generation via specific channels.

🆓 66 credits/day; Kling 3.0 full version available unlimited free via third-party channels (Daily)
Paid from: $8/month
View Details

CapCut AI

⭐ 4
Video Generation

ByteDance's video editor with AI features including smart subtitles, text-to-video, AI effects, and one-tap editing. Basic editing and common AI features are free.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: ~$4/month
View Details

Luma Dream Machine

⭐ 3.5
Video Generation

By Luma, realistic physics and lighting. 30 free generations per month, enough to try it out.

🆓 30 generations/month (Monthly)
Paid from: $9.99/month
View Details

Runway

⭐ 3.5
Video Generation

Pioneer in AI video generation. Gen-3 Alpha model delivers excellent quality. 125 free credits monthly, enough for a few high-quality short clips. Popular among professional creators.

🆓 125 credits (one-time) (One-time)
Paid from: $12/month
View Details

Pika

⭐ 3.5
Video Generation

Pika excels at creative effects and style transfers. Free credits reset daily, good for short video content and social media material.

🆓 10 generations/day (Daily)
Paid from: $8/month
View Details

Sora

⭐ 3
Video Generation

OpenAI's video generation tool, Sora 2 is back online. Unlimited free 1080p watermark-free generation available through free channels. Quality is top-tier among similar tools.

🆓 2 ()
Paid from: Shut Down
View Details

DupDub

⭐ 3
AI Digital Human

Free watermark-free AI digital human video generator. Supports Chinese. Best free alternative to D-ID. Converts text to videos with realistic faces, perfect for talking-head videos and product introductions.

🆓 0 (One-time)
Paid from: TBD
View Details

Tencent ZenVideo

⭐ 3
Video Generation

Tencent's digital human video platform. Supports text-driven digital avatar narration, AI dubbing, and video editing. Free version available with watermark and length limits.

🆓 30 seconds per video (One-time)
Paid from: ~$420/year
View Details
